name: Pin High Indoor Golf
about: Pin High Indoor Golf offers a unique indoor golf experience using industry-leading TruGolf simulators. Players can access world-class golf courses year-round, unaffected by weather, and enjoy a relaxed atmosphere without mosquitoes or course delays. The venue provides the option to bring personal clubs or use available rentals and features a bar offering craft beers and top-shelf liquors for an all-in-one social and golfing experience. Located at 23726 College Blvd, Olathe, KS, the facility operates with set hours on weekdays and weekends, with earlier hours available upon request.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf regardless of Midwest weather
TruGolf simulators with access to world-class courses
Relaxed atmosphere without course delays or mosquitoes
On-site bar offering craft beers and top-shelf liquors
Option to bring personal clubs or use rentals

food_and_drink.notes: No food served, but external delivery and personal food allowed
Full bar with craft beers and top-shelf liquors available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading simulators used for the golf experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Most people prefer to use their own clubs, but we do have clubs available as well.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: We do not currently serve food, but most places deliver to our location and you are welcome to bring your own. We have bottled water, alcoholic beverages, and select sodas available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided about the time required to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, our facility is family-friendly and all ages are welcome.
